warnings: Could not resolve 'chemkit' to a SMILES from any reliable source. Tried: PubChem, OPSIN, NIST WebBook. Check the spelling, supply a SMILES string directly, or provide an .xyz file.

prose: Unable to build a 3 D structure: the name “chemkit” could not be matched to any known compound in PubChem, OPSIN, or NIST WebBook. Please supply a recognized chemical name, a SMILES string, or an existing coordinate file so that the structure can be generated with verified provenance.
